calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-03-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-03-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Paul Arshawsky, Esq. appeared for plaintiff John Stewart Company.
Plaintiff's Witness Bridgette Moore, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defendant Raymond Micheletti.

Exhibit 1 -Ten Day Notice----------------- ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 -Lease Agreement---------------- ID/EVID.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Judgment for Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 467 Turk Street, #605, San Francisco, CA. 94102
The lease is forfeited.
Back Rent in the amount of $1,904.00, and Holdover Damages in the amount of $498.00
Costs $285.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $2,687.00
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Off Calendar
